## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated, and `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] Docs/README updated if the public surface changed
- [ ] **Respects the design principles** (CONTRIBUTING.md): tiny surface,
      safe-by-default, don't reinvent what LiteLLM/instructor/Headroom already do
- [ ] New defaults are safe (no lossy/correctness-risky behavior turned on by default)
